string 2: Ah, the white warrior! You're awake at last!

I owe you a great debt. 
As a real man, I have a duty to express my gratitude in person.
Will you at least tell me your name?
I am Omnimon.
I see. My name is Ban—
No need. I do not require an explanation of who you are.

Hmph. You prefer to let your fists do the talking, too?
I think we'll get along just fine.
I very much doubt that.

I observed everything while I slumbered...
including your duels.

You saw a black crystal in each of those areas, did you not?
My consciousness was trapped inside.
What do you mean?

Those crystals are a mechanism designed to control this blank space.
My mind and body were used to power them.

I was unable to resist as they continued to drain my energy.
But then... something changed.

Suddenly, it felt like someone else was being drained, just like me.
I felt their presence in the crystals as well.

But I could tell, that person never stopped resisting. 
I heard a voice, constantly crying out.

Yearning to be heard by those they hold most dear.
And the owner of that voice...
M-Me?! Why me?!

Well, you ARE constantly recording videos... 
That means there's someone out there you want to reach, does it not?
But... b-but I don't have that kind of power...
Here, pure strength means nothing.

Parallelmon and this space... It draws upon the power of
sincere wishes, made from the heart. For example...

...if there were someone who wished to go back in time,
Parallelmon uses their wish to bend space-time to their will.

It seems the power of your wish, your heart...
It exceeded Parallelmon's expectations.

So you're telling me that physical strength doesn't matter...
That it's all about what's in here? Deep in your heart?

I have no idea if such a thing is possible or not. 
I can make a number of educated guesses, though.

If this world is powered by the energy of others, 
then it might be possible to influence it with similar energies.

If the control mechanism exists physically as crystals,
it's only natural to assume there is a limit to their capacity.

I imagine her wish—a wish that exceeded Parallelmon's expectations—
caused some kind of overflow...

...and as a result, Hiroko was able to assume control 
over this Akashic Backdoor—on a subconscious level.

That's probably why the crystals were filled with
recreations of nothing but Hiroko's memories.

At any rate, much like all of you, 
I also need to return to my original world.

Let us defeat Parallelmon, the ravager of time and space,
and escape this place together.

The final showdown, huh... 
This is the moment my fists have been waiting for!

My wounds have healed.
I'm ready for action whenever you are.
I've had enough rest.

Let's get out there and show 'em what
the Mamemon Alliance is made of!

I feel the strength of your spirit, everyone! 
But we should split up our forces in case anything happens.
I'm coming with you. I've had enough rest.

And I am certain that the knowledge I gained while
imprisoned in the crystals will prove useful to our cause.
So, there's room for just one more...
Our preparations are complete. It is time to go.
